billDate.description: The invoice bill date in local date format

invoiceNumber.description: The number uniquely identifying this invoice. Same as Statement.Invoice.invoiceNumber.

description.description: Payment description generated by the billing system

maxRefundableAmount.description: The maximum amount that can be refunded

paymentDate.description: The date on which the invoice was paid in local date format

refundedAmount.description: The amount that has been refunded by a previous refund. 0, if no refund has happened.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the original transaction

transactionNumber.description: The transactionNumber identifying the transaction used for paying the entirety of a statement. Same as Statement.PaymentDetails.transactionNumber

addressLine1.description: The first address line of the customer

addressLine2.description: The second address line of the customer

currency.description: The currency of the Account. See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

id.description: The externally facing unique ID for the Customer Details.

organisationName.description: The organisation name of the customer

taxpayerId.description: The taxpayer identifier for the customer

email.description: The primary email address where invoices will be sent

firstName.description: The first name of the Invoice Contact

id.description: The unique identifier for the Invoice Contact

lastName.description: The last name of the Invoice Contact

endDate.description: The end date of the billing period in local date format yyyy-mm-dd.

renewalFrequency.description: The renewal frequency, either MONTHLY, ANNUAL, or PERPETUAL.

startDate.description: The start date of the billing period in local date format yyyy-mm-dd.

addressLine1.description: First line of the address where the customer is located

addressLine2.description: Second line of the address where the customer is located

city.description: City of the address where the customer is located

country.description: ISO 3166 two-letter country code for the country where this account will be used

email.description: The email of the customer contact details associated with this account

firstName.description: The first name of the customer contact details associated with this account

lastName.description: The last name of the customer contact details associated with this account

phone.description: Contact phone number for the customer

postcode.description: Postcode of the address where the customer is located

state.description: State for the address where the customer is located

trialEndDate.description: The end date of the trial period if on a trial rate schedule.

usage.description: A list of usage elements for each entitlement.

Line.description: A line for each of the entitlements belonging to an entitlement-group.

accountId.description: The Account ID that this Entitlement Group belongs to

outstandingBalance.description: The outstanding balance on the entitlement group

creditCardSessionId.description: The id of the Credit Card Session to store credit card information against

creditCardToken.description: The Credit Card Token which can be used to process future payments

creditCardValidationCode.description: The validation code returned as a result of validating the Credit Card information stored in the session

paymentMethodId.description: The Payment Method ID to use for processing the payment

addressLine1.description: The first line of the Billing Details address

addressLine2.description: The second line of the Billing Details address

city.description: The city of the Billing Details address

country.description: The country of the Billing Details address

firstName.description: The first name of the owner of the Billing Details

id.description: The id of this Billing Details record

lastName.description: The last name of the owner of the Billing Details

postcode.description: The postcode of the Billing Details address

state.description: The state of the Billing Details address

paymentAmount.description: The amount paid within this transaction.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used, e.g. Credit Card

paymentProcessorId.description: The order id of the transaction with the payment processor, e.g. TNS' orderId.

transactionNumber.description: The transactionNumber identifying the transaction used for paying the entirety of a statement.

invoices.description: A list of invoices. Empty list if there are no invoices.

availableInternally.description: Indicates whether the transition should be available internally.

availableToCustomers.description: Indicates whether the transition should be available to customers.

needsPaymentDetailsOnAccount.description: Indicates that in order to be able to this transition payment details need to be present on the billing system account.

entitlementGroupId.description: The entitlement group id (Cloud ID) to associate the usage with.

entitlementId.description: The entitlement id (product) which this usage is associated with.

id.description: Unique id for the usage record. This is used to ensure idempotency of requests.

unitLabel.description: The type of usage to load. Will be something like 'users', 'minutes'.

taxRate.description: The applied tax rate in percent.

units.description: The current plan instance units (e.g. number of "Confluence Users") or the current usage units of a particular service (e.g. number of "Bitbucket Build Minutes").

comments.description: Optional user comment on the refund

refundReason.description: Reason for the refund. A list of valid refund reasons can be retrieved via the get-refund-reasons endpoint.

creditCardSessionId.description: The session id that a consumer can use to send Credit Card info to TNS

merchantId.description: The merchant id that a consumer can use when rendering a form to send Credit Card info to TNS

callbackAuthToken.description: Auth token to send when calling back

callbackUrl.description: URL to callback to once processing is complete

token.description: The token returned from the TNS Payment Gateway

accountId.description: The id of the Billing Account that this entitlement belongs to

entitlementGroupId.description: The id of the Entitlement Group that this entitlement belongs to

productKey.description: The product key that this Entitlement relates to

selectedEdition.description: The current selected edition of this entitlement
